paragraphs: The stock price of Fermi Inc. is currently at 6, with a change of 1.1% compared to the prior close and a change of -30.77% over a window of 21 sessions. There have been 3 new news items in the last 24 hours.

Recent news headlines include discussions of the company's convertible senior notes offering and the resignation of director designee Miles Everson due to governance concerns. Sources such as simplywall.st and Yahoo Finance have reported on these developments, with one article questioning whether the bull case for Fermi has changed.

There have been various SEC filings recently, including 8-K forms related to the convertible senior notes offering and the resignation of Miles Everson, as well as a SCHEDULE 13D/A and a DFAN14A form. Insider activity includes one Form 4 filing, and there have been 2 new social posts in the last 24 hours, with users discussing the stock price and their investment decisions.
